key.name: default-format
key.description: The default format used when creating new library files.

key.name: auto-fetch-doi
key.description: Automatically query CrossRef when a DOI is found in a document.

key.name: crossref-email
key.description: Email address sent to CrossRef API for polite pool access.

key.name: last-library-path
key.description: Path to the most recently opened library file.

key.name: watch-folder-path
key.description: Path to a folder being monitored for new documents to import.
